narrative:
Cadiz Township has 2,119 registered voters, with 60.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points.
